coachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +33.6% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Lane Lurker
augments.note: passive trade-off vs minions with regen penalty; lane-state dependent

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 25 — about 155 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.
Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 24 — about 863 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +54% more one-combo burst: try Viper over Overlord (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 25 — about 6,025 effective HP vs physical in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 35% of its bite; you give up 33% of your damage.

name: Khaimera

laneFlex.headline: skirmish uptime
laneFlex.provenance: “Feral Ambush” ⇒ poke; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field jungle 52.6% over 885,007 games, magnitude not simulated.

laneFlex.headline: drain sustain
laneFlex.provenance: “Lane Lurker” ⇒ sustain; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field offlane 52.7% over 94,227 games, magnitude not simulated.
